CVE-2024-45752.title: logiops through 0.3.4, in its default configuration, allows any u ...
CVE-2024-45752.description: logiops through 0.3.4, in its default configuration, allows any unprivileged user to configure its logid daemon via an unrestricted D-Bus service, including setting malicious keyboard macros. This allows for privilege escalation with minimal user interaction.
